---
title: "Modular Manifolds: A Short Note"
author: "Jane Researcher"
date: "2026-05-02"
toc: false   # this short post opts out of the table of contents
---

This is a second sample post so the blogroll has more than one entry. It exists
purely to show how multiple posts stack in the listing, sorted newest-first.

## Why this matters

Constraining weight matrices to well-conditioned manifolds can make optimization
better behaved. The details are left as an exercise; this paragraph is here to give
the page some body text and demonstrate spacing between sections.

Delete this post once you start writing your own.
